scripts.build: echo 'Deploying conversion binaries...' && mkdir -p libreoffice && if [ ! -f './libreoffice/instdir/program/soffice' ] && [ ! -f './libreoffice/program/soffice' ]; then curl -L https://github.com/vladgolubev/serverless-libreoffice/releases/download/6.1.0/lo.tar.gz | tar -xz -C ./libreoffice; fi && chmod -R +x ./libreoffice/
